summary: Frontend-only verification of iter 55 fixes (Connect mode toolbar + click-to-connect flow, count-selector N multiplier, teaser screenshot swap). All three primary fixes PASS. Connect mode button exists and toggles with cyan active highlight. Clicking first node applies magenta drop-shadow (rgb(255,106,213)) + dashed magenta outline; clicking second node creates exactly one new connector annotation (mm-annot-connector-*); Escape exits connect mode; cursor is crosshair when mode is on and returns to grab when off. Count-selector FIX B verified: with 6-node fresh map, selecting count=5 in the context menu and clicking Add Child yielded exactly 5 new children (6 -> 11). Teaser FIX C verified: cinematic-teaser renders when landing is unlocked, frame-0/1/2 src are /teaser/mind-mapper-1.png, -2.png, -3.png respectively; all three image URLs return HTTP 200; next-chevron rotates active frame.

ui_bugs.issue: React warning 'Maximum update depth exceeded' logged to console repeatedly when toggling connect mode / clicking source node. Feature still works but indicates a setState-in-useEffect loop (likely connectFrom/connectMode effect deps). Non-blocking but should be investigated to avoid perf regressions.

Could not locate a toast element containing the text 'Connected' after completing a click-to-connect action, even though the connector annotation is created. Either the toast text differs, uses portaled DOM not matched by naive text search, or is not being triggered. Connector creation itself works.

action_items: Investigate 'Maximum update depth exceeded' warning in MindMapCanvas when connect mode is active (likely a useEffect whose dependency array includes an object reference that changes every render — e.g. connectFrom).
Verify the 'Connected' toast fires on successful click-to-connect (or update docs / review_request to match actual toast text).
critical_code_review_comments: MindMapCanvas.jsx is >2400 lines; strongly recommend splitting into sub-modules (toolbar, node renderer, connect-mode handler, context menu glue) for maintainability.
Connect-mode effect at ~line 534 sets state on mode changes — ensure no object-identity deps cause re-entry loops (source of Maximum update depth warning).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the 3 requested fixes (A1, A2, A3 connect mode; B count multiplier; C teaser swap)

seed_data_creation: Cleared mm_/graph/nodes localStorage keys to get the default 6-node fresh map for FIX B verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter-55 fixes verified on preview URL. FIX B requires a map under the 30-node free cap; clear mm_*/graph*/nodes* localStorage keys to obtain a fresh 6-node map. FIX C teaser is only mounted when landing is unlocked via /?unlock=mind-mapper67 (plain / shows 'Coming soon'). Preview assets /teaser/mind-mapper-{1,2,3}.png respond 200 via in-browser fetch (HEAD returns 403 at ingress — use GET). Two non-blocking issues: React 'Maximum update depth exceeded' warning on connect-mode, and 'Connected' toast not detectable by text search.
rca of the issue: N/A — fixes are verified working. Minor console warning RCA: the Maximum update depth warning likely originates from the new connect-mode useEffect at /app/frontend/src/components/MindMapCanvas.jsx:534 if its dep array causes re-subscription each render. Recommend audit.
